name: devops-status-mcp-server
description: Check vendor status pages, inspect SSL/TLS certificates, verify DNS propagation, and get incident-response playbooks.

interface.shortDescription: Check vendor status pages, inspect SSL/TLS certificates, verify DNS propagation, and get incident-response playbooks.
interface.longDescription: Infrastructure health and incident intelligence. Check 48 built-in vendors (GitHub, Cloudflare, OpenAI, Slack, and more) via Atlassian Statuspage, inspect SSL/TLS certificates and DNS propagation for any domain, and get deterministic incident-response playbooks — all without API keys.
